extraction.one_line_summary: TRENTIN Matteo won from 18-rider breakaway after Quick-Step controlled final descent with teammate Terpstra, dropped ROJAS in final 100m sprint
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step placed two riders (Terpstra and Trentin) in breakaway, controlled final descent tactics when Terpstra dropped back strategically.
Van Rensburg attacked 50km out on first ascent but quartet formation (Terpstra/Rojas/Rosen) neutralized solo move before final climb.
Froome lost 29 seconds to Nicolas Roche in peloton on descent despite no GC battle, suggesting Sky weakness in technical downhills.

rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: Used Rojas as downhill pacer then outsprinted him, showing tactical opportunism combined with fast-twitch finishing
rider_signals.ROCHE Nicolas: positive: Gained 29 seconds on Froome in peloton on technical descent, suggesting underrated descending ability for GC positioning
rider_signals.TERPSTRA Niki: positive: Sacrificed own result after making four-man selection to pace teammate Trentin on descent, effective domestique work in breakaway
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: Lost time to Roche on descent despite no attacks, revealing technical descending vulnerability
